SEARCH
Package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.reflect

Class ReflectiveAccess

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.reflect.ReflectiveAccess
public final class ReflectiveAccess extends Object
Lightweight helpers for optional runtime integrations via reflection.

All operations are safe-by-default and return Optional values instead of throwing reflective exceptions.
